description_long: This sculpture depicts a reclining human figure, draped partially in cloth, lying on its side atop an ornate, rectangular base. The figure appears to be female, with detailed anatomical features and flowing hair, and is surrounded by intricately carved elements that resemble foliage or organic forms. The base is bordered and rests on a wooden platform, providing a sense of elevation and separation from the ground. The material of the sculpture is a smooth, white stone, likely marble, which contrasts with the darker, polished stone of the base. The craftsmanship is highly detailed, with careful attention to the folds of the cloth and the naturalistic pose of the figure. The overall impression is one of serene repose, with the figure's head resting on an outstretched arm and the body gently curved.
description: A detailed marble sculpture of a reclining human figure, partially draped in cloth, resting on an ornate stone base atop a wooden platform.
description_view_0: From this view, the head and upper torso of the reclining figure are most prominent, with the draped cloth and detailed base visible in the foreground.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the full length of the figure's body, showing the outstretched arm, the curvature of the back, and the intricate base details.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the figure and the flowing lines of the cloth, as well as the sculpted elements on the base.
description_view_3: This opposite side view displays the figure's legs and the side of the face, with the ornate base and platform clearly visible.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a wooden platform, suggesting an indoor or protected setting such as a gallery or museum.
